mapper.select: select * from aiw_user_preference where user_biz_id = #{userBizId} and is_deleted = 0 order by preference_key
mapper.insert: insert into aiw_user_preference (biz_id, user_biz_id, preference_key, value_type, preference_value, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) values (#{bizId}, #{userBizId}, #{preferenceKey}, #{valueType}, #{preferenceValue}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted}) on duplicate key update value_type = values(value_type), preference_value = values(preference_value), updated_at = values(updated_at), is_deleted = values(is_deleted)
mapper.update: update aiw_user_preference set is_deleted = 1 where user_biz_id = #{userBizId}
